_meta._v2_fix: FIX 19.07 (Tomek): (1) UMIEJSCOWIENIE — v1 kladl urzadzenie na GARDLE (przod szyi) w scenach hook/relief/cta; v2 przebudowuje te 3 sceny na KARK OD TYLU (nape/back of the neck/upper trapezius, seen from behind-side) — kotwica placement_ref=refs/g0_worn.jpg; worn/heads bez zmian (juz OK). (2) VO z pelnymi diakrytykami (v1 czytal ASCII 'BOL/NAPIECIE').
_meta.doktryna: EDYTUJ PRAWDE (0i v3) + kref na scenach produktowych (0i-b). Kazda klatka startowa = nano-EDYCJA realnego cropu produktu (KEEP piksele) z dorysowana persona/pokojem. kref kotwiczy tozsamosc masazera przez caly klip (elements: frontal g0_float + refy g0_worn/g5_deglow/g2_left). Masazer NIE zmienia stanu — glowice UGNIATAJA (uzycie). Loop-close = FLF (echo hooka).
_meta.kanon_kata: masazer zapiety paskiem na BARKU/KARKU, ujecie z TYLU-BOKU (behind-side profile); silikonowe glowice-dlonie obejmuja KARK OD TYLU (nape/upper trapezius), NIGDY gardla/przodu szyi; panel widoczny z boku, pasek przez bark; young woman resting on side / seated seen from behind-side, bright bedroom
_meta.engine_mix: hook/worn/heads/relief = kref (Kling O1 ref-to-video); cta = FLF (Kling 2.5 first+last, loop-close); klatki = nano-banana/edit; VO ElevenLabs v3 (Aria), muzyka+ambient(+motor hum)+SFX Stable Audio 2.5

wzorzec.hook_type: PROBLEM-FIRST / specific-outcome (ból karku/sciatica) + produkt-w-akcji od klatki 1 (glowice ugniataja kark)
wzorzec.audio_character: cisza-i-reakcja / raw-diegetic: cichy UGC (mean -16 dB), narracje niesie NAPIS na ekranie (problem->ulga), brak wyraznej mowy VO; delikatny ambient pokoju + subtelny masaz

on_screen_text.text: If you have neck pain or sciatica / You NEED this
I had the worst neck pain

loop.jak: ostatnie ujecie (ulga, masazer na karku, close) wracalo do klimatu pierwszego (masazer na karku close) — problem->ulga->problem

wzorzec.reaction_sound: ciche westchniecie ulgi (oddany DZWIEKIEM: sfx_exhale w scenie relief, NIE doklejana mimika)
wzorzec.comment_driver: silikonowe glowice w ksztalcie LUDZKIEJ DLONI ugniatajace kark 'jak masazysta' + hands-free na pasku

hook_design.typ_kreacji: PROBLEM-FIRST / specific-outcome: masazer JUZ ugniata kark/trapez (glowice-dlonie), jasny kadr, produkt duzy w kadrze; nie zapowiada
hook_design._bramka: jasny wysokokontrastowy hook, produkt-w-akcji duzy, brak intro/ciemnego kadru = PASS

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: EXTREME CLOSE-UP from BEHIND-SIDE on the NAPE and upper trapezius of a young woman seen in profile - we see the BACK of her neck, her dark bun and the back of her jaw/ear, NOT her throat and NOT the front of her neck. The massager sits hands-free on her shoulder / upper trapezius with its green woven fabric body, chrome band and silver control panel facing the camera in profile, and its dark-green silicone hand-fingers are curled and pressed into the NAPE (back of the neck) from behind, exactly like the reference product photo. The brown leather strap runs down over the shoulder. The device FILLS much of the frame (large, dominant). Bright cozy bedroom, soft cream pillow behind. Soft natural window light, high-key, photorealistic UGC smartphone look.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The massager stays perfectly still and identical in shape - only its silicone hand-fingers gently knead and press into the NAPE and upper trapezius from behind in a slow circular motion, the skin lightly gives under the pressure, her shoulder eases down and she breathes out slowly, eyes closed. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift, kept in behind-side profile. No shape change of the device, no rotation, the device stays on the BACK of the neck (never the throat), bright high-key room.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: extreme close na KARK OD TYLU-BOKU (nape) + urzadzenie na barku, ujecie profilowe (panel widoczny z boku), glowice-dlonie obejmuja kark od tylu
kontrakt_produktowy.placement: nape / back of the neck / upper trapezius, seen from behind-side; korpus na barku, silikonowa dlon obejmuje KARK OD TYLU (NIGDY gardlo / przod szyi)
kontrakt_produktowy.uzycie: silikonowe glowice-dlonie ugniataja KARK/trapez od tylu, skora ugina sie pod palcami
must_not_show: osoba odchylona z broda w gore i wyeksponowanym gardlem
druga glowica jako guz bez palcow

sceny._cut: talking-head/relief: tnij na oddechu (payoff ulgi ma wyladowac)

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: A bright bedroom: the same young woman seated upright on the edge of a bed, seen from the side. The massager sits on her RIGHT shoulder and the right side of her neck ONLY (one side, NOT wrapped around the whole neck, NOT a symmetric U-pillow); the brown leather strap runs diagonally across her chest and under her opposite (left) arm to hold it hands-free; the dark-green silicone hand-fingers grip her right trapezius; her hands rest empty in her lap. Medium shot showing the one-shoulder hands-free strap setup. Soft window light, high-key, photorealistic UGC.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The massager stays perfectly still and identical - held hands-free by the strap, its silicone hand-heads slowly knead and grip her trapezius, the woman relaxes her shoulders and tilts her head gently. Her hands stay empty and resting. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift. No device shape change, no rotation, no extra device.
sceny.vo_pl: Zapinam to na bark i wlaczam.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: medium shot z boku-tylu, masazer po prawej na barku, pasek + glowice widoczne (hands-free)
kontrakt_produktowy.uzycie: hands-free na pasku, glowice ugniataja trapez od tylu

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: Keep the massager EXACTLY as its pixels in the reference product crop (3/4 view: green woven pillow body, chrome band, silver oval control panel, dark-green silicone hand-shaped heads with thumb and four fingers). Add a bright bedroom close-up: the device resting against the woman's neck and shoulder skin, the silicone hand-fingers curled and pressed into her trapezius; macro detail of the green fabric texture, the chrome band and the hand-shaped heads. Soft window light, high-key, photorealistic UGC.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The massager stays perfectly still and identical - only the silicone hand-fingers flex and knead against the skin in a slow gripping motion, like a masseuse's hand, the skin dimpling slightly under the fingertips. Camera static, subtle handheld micro-drift, tiny slow push-in. No device shape change, no rotation, fingers never fuse into a blob.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: makro 3/4 na glowice-dlonie + korpus, produkt wypelnia kadr
must_show: wyrazne silikonowe palce (kciuk + 4 palce) dociskajace skore

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: Keep the massager EXACTLY as its pixels in the reference product crop. A bright bedroom: the same young woman resting on her SIDE on pillows, seen from BEHIND-SIDE so we see the BACK of her neck (nape) and the side of her face in profile (jaw, cheek, one closed eye, a soft relieved half-smile); shoulders dropped and relaxed. The massager is strapped hands-free on her shoulder / upper trapezius, its dark-green silicone hand-fingers resting and pressing into the NAPE (back of the neck) from behind - never on her throat or the front of her neck. The brown strap runs over the shoulder. Softer, calm, cozy. Soft warm window light, high-key, photorealistic UGC. Natural skin texture with visible pores, not waxy.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: Take @Image1 as the start frame. The massager stays perfectly still and identical - its silicone hand-fingers keep slowly kneading the NAPE from behind, the woman exhales, her half-smile softens and her shoulders sink deeper with relief, head resting. Camera static, subtle handheld micro-drift, kept in behind-side profile. No device shape change, the device stays on the BACK of the neck (never the throat), warm calm room.

kontrakt_produktowy.kat: plan sredni-bliski z TYLU-BOKU, profil twarzy + KARK OD TYLU (nape) + urzadzenie na barku

rozluzniona osoba w profilu (oczy zamkniete, opadle ramiona)

otwarte oczy patrzace w kamere jak spiker

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: ECHO of the hook frame: extreme close from BEHIND-SIDE on the woman's NAPE / back of the neck and the massager (green woven body, chrome band, front panel, silicone hand-fingers curled into the nape from behind), product large in frame, bright high-key bedroom; hero, alive. We see the BACK of the neck, not the throat and not the front of the neck. Keep the massager EXACTLY as its reference pixels.
sceny.last_brief_en: Keep EXACTLY the same framing, lighting, background, camera angle and massager position on the nape. Change ONLY: the silicone hand-fingers have kneaded slightly deeper into the BACK of the neck and the woman's shoulder has eased down a touch. No device shape change, keep the two hand-heads, the device stays on the BACK of the neck (never the throat), no readable text.
sceny.motion_prompt_en: The massager stays perfectly still and identical; only the silicone hand-fingers slowly knead the NAPE / back of the neck from behind and the shoulder eases down. Camera static with subtle handheld micro-drift, kept in behind-side profile. No rotation, no device morphing, the device stays on the BACK of the neck, bright high-key room. Ends on the same close hero framing as the opening (loop).

sceny._cut: LOOP CLOSE: ostatnia klatka = echo pierwszej; audio ciagle przez granice petli

loop_close.first_frame_echo: cta = ten sam extreme-close kadr co hook (kark + masazer po prawej, glowice na trapezie, jasny pokoj) — para hook<->cta projektowana razem
loop_close.audio_continuity: muzyka bez outro/fade + motor-hum w ambiencie ciagly przez granice petli; sfx_knead na cta lustrem hooka
loop_close.closing_line_setup: 'Juz tego nie oddam' (ulga) -> ustawia otwierajace 'Mialam koszmarny bol karku' (problem)

audio.music_brief: warm modern feel-good wellness pop, soft steady punchy kick + light claps from the first second, cozy bright synths, radio-ready punchy mix, constant energy until the very end, no outro, no fade out, absolutely no vocals, NO lo-fi, NO ambient; seconds_total 25

ambient_bed.opis: quiet warm cozy bedroom room tone with a soft steady low electric massage-device motor hum in the background, gentle calm seamless, NO melody, NO music, NO beat

audio._sfx_regula: kazda akcja fizyczna = foley-hit (require_sfx): sfx_knead (ugniatanie), sfx_click (przycisk+start), sfx_knead2 (ASMR detal), sfx_exhale (ulga)

consistency.produkt: ten sam zielony masazer we WSZYSTKICH scenach: zielona tkanina + chromowa obrecz + panel + 2 silikonowe glowice-dlonie + brazowy pasek; ZERO morfu, ZERO drugiego egzemplarza
consistency.rekwizyty: brazowy pasek (kanon), jasny pokoj, kremowa posciel/sofa; masazer zawsze na BARKU z glowicami na KARKU OD TYLU (nape), ujecie behind-side; NIGDY na gardle/przodzie szyi
consistency.stany: brak zmiany stanu mechanizmu — glowice tylko ugniataja (uzycie); persona = ta sama mloda kobieta
